rationale: The cited paper directly studies ex ante contractual incompleteness and governance-performance alignment, which overlaps with the citing paper’s core focus on contractual completeness/one-sidedness and governance outcomes. The citing note explicitly positions its contribution against prior empirical work on contractual completeness, making this 2005 empirical governance study a plausible substantive prior anchor rather than an incidental mention. With no in-text citation snippet to show it is merely perfunctory, it should be retained for full relation judgment.
